name: weather
description: Weather information — current conditions and forecasts

tools.name: weather_current
tools.description: Get current weather for a city
tools.planner_hint: Use when user asks about current weather or temperature for any city. Put city name in description.

tools.name: weather_forecast
tools.description: Get 3-day weather forecast for a city
tools.planner_hint: Use when user asks about weather forecast or upcoming weather. Put city name in description.
